title: Tutor event (offline Fusha runtime, event-sourced)
description: One append-only event per graded attempt, emitted by tools/fusha_tutor_runtime.py. The event log is the replayable record of a tutoring session (event sourcing): replaying the events over the bank reconstructs the progress state. Grading is computed from the answer payload's CONTENT (matched/forbidden/required-reasoning), NEVER from a learner/model self-reported correctness flag. Deterministic. Source-clean (every text field is leak-scanned). Written only when --write is passed.

seq.description: Monotonic event sequence within a session.

grade.description: The computed grade — derived from content, not self-report.

passed.description: Answer matched expected_answer or an accepted_variant (normalized).

forbidden_hit.description: A forbidden_answer appeared in the response.

cleared.description: Full pass: passed AND reasoning_passed AND not forbidden AND two_vote not pending.
